response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive software development experience, particularly in full-stack and web technologies, but his background lacks direct alignment with the embedded networking and security-focused requirements of this role. His C/C++ experience is limited and not recent, and there is no explicit mention of Japanese language proficiency or deep embedded firmware/security expertise.
strengths: Strong software development background with 10+ years of experience in diverse domains (web, mobile, desktop, and embedded).
Proven ability to work in collaborative environments and contribute to complex systems (e.g., Stripe, Shopify, Datadog).
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical communities, including workshops and talks.
concerns: No explicit experience with embedded firmware development for LAN-switch products or security technologies (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X).
Limited recent experience with C programming (last noted in 2015) and no clear evidence of Linux kernel modification capability.
Lacks native-level Japanese proficiency, a hard requirement for the role.
